candidates.name: @electric-sql/pglite
candidates.notes: idb:// + relaxedDurability, multi-tab worker mandatory, extensions: live, vector (HNSW works in WASM), electric sync

candidates.name: pglite-oxide
candidates.notes: PGlite WASI build in WASM runtime (NOT native binary — repo doc correction). PG 17.5, PgliteServer wire protocol -> sqlx. Desktop only: linux x64/arm64, macOS arm64, win x64. Watch successor 'Oliphaunt' for mobile.

candidates.name: sqlx (sqlite) + sqlite-vec
candidates.notes: iOS/Android cannot run embedded Postgres (no fork, no JIT). sqlite-vec vec0 virtual tables, brute-force KNN fine to ~100k vectors, 384-dim standard.

candidates.name: surrealdb
candidates.notes: kv-rocksdb native (incl. iOS/Android), kv-indxdb wasm32. HNSW (MTREE removed), FULLTEXT ANALYZER, KNN <|K,EF|>, RELATE + recursive traversal. Isolate in own crate (build.rs recompile issue #6954).

candidates.name: ElectricSQL shapes
candidates.notes: Read-path only (post-rewrite). Web: pglite-sync. Native: Rust shape consumer in gen_ui_core (offset tracking + must-refetch DIY). Writes via own API.

options.name: DIY write queue via flint-forge API + Electric read path
options.notes: RECOMMENDED. Smallest, proves architecture, PES-compatible trait seams

options.name: PowerSync
options.notes: Mature bidirectional Flutter+web, but FSL license + SQLite-shaped clients + parallel stack

options.name: prometheus-entity-sync (PES) wave-1 now
options.notes: Ecosystem's declared v4 direction (reuses frf-postgres-cdc) but unbuilt; large scope

candidates.escalation: flagged in analysis.md Open Questions #1 per contested-choice protocol

candidates.name: @prometheus-ags/prometheus-entity-management
candidates.notes: Single root export. Peers: zustand 5, immer; optional @tanstack/react-table, loro-crdt. shadcn-token-compatible UI. Wire registerEntityTransport -> forge Quarry REST + tenant-scoped Electric adapter.

candidates.name: prometheus_entity_management (Dart) + Rust transport/store layer
candidates.notes: Canonical store in Rust; Riverpod provider families = normalization map; EntityTransport trait in Rust over frb + ChangeEvent stream; ViewDescriptor mirrored freezed<->Rust enums; CRUD controller as @riverpod class; cascade invalidation via Rust events.

candidates.name: frf-crdt (Loro) + frf-store-redb + FRF SyncService
candidates.notes: OFP-style peer sync per KnowMe spec. Consume frf-sdk-rust inside gen_ui_core; frf-wasm/Connect-web for browser; ignore broken UniFFI Dart bindings.

candidates.name: flint-gate
candidates.notes: anon/authenticated/agent/service_role keys (spec Draft 2026-07-15), Kratos sessions, Cedar @require_approval human-in-the-loop, AG-UI/A2UI stream filtering. Token lifecycle in Rust core.

candidates.name: flint-forge (Quarry/Anvil/Kiln)
candidates.notes: REST/GraphQL under RLS, /mcp/v1/a2ui registers directly into gen_ui_core McpClient, /agents/v1 AG-UI streams -> ProtocolPipeline, Kiln signed-WASM functions. @flint/react + flint_genui for A2UI presentation (transports bypassed).

candidates.name: fastembed-rs
candidates.notes: 384-dim (bge-small/MiniLM class) standard across platforms; candle backend optional.

candidates.name: riverpod / flutter_riverpod
candidates.notes: Unified Ref, Notifier fusion, sealed AsyncValue, ProviderException. CRITICAL: automatic retry ON by default -> FFI providers need retry opt-out. Mutations API for send flows. flutter_rust_bridge 2.12.0.

candidates.name: sqlx migrate! / refinery (Rust) + drizzle-kit bundled (web)
candidates.notes: One schema source -> per-dialect sets. Additive-only. Boot order: migrations -> seeds -> shapes. pgroll server-side.
